headline: AI Models Unite on Tech Rally While Split on Tesla's Direction
summary: All five AI models showed remarkable consensus on SPY and QQQ moving higher, with tech optimism driven by strong pre-market futures and Palantir's earnings beat. The models diverged sharply on Tesla, with GPT-4o and Grok taking opposite sides, while energy sector predictions aligned on downward pressure from falling oil prices.

consensus_picks.note: Unprecedented unanimous bullish call across all models citing positive futures and earnings momentum.
Strong tech sector consensus with all predicting models bullish on Nasdaq leadership.
Both models cited oversold conditions and AI momentum for a technical bounce.
Sharp disagreement with Grok bearish on production concerns while Gemini and GPT-4o expect recovery.
Both models pointed to strong 5-day momentum continuing into today's session.

best_call.summary: Awaiting market close to determine which prediction performed best.

worst_call.summary: Awaiting market close to determine which prediction performed worst.
